short_summary: Iran deal signing disputed by Tehran
rationale: Trump's claim of imminent Iran deal signing contradicted by Tehran keeps the situation unresolved and politically significant for US residents; other headlines are background noise or continuation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Trump's announcement of an imminent Iran deal is contradicted by Tehran, prolonging uncertainty over Middle East stability, oil prices, and US military posture — directly relevant to American daily life.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
